Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Premium digital solutions tailored for your business

sosyal-medya-yonetimi.title: Social Media Management
sosyal-medya-yonetimi.subtitle: Strategic and Measurable Social Media Approach
sosyal-medya-yonetimi.content: Being present on social media is no longer enough. The real key is establishing effective communication with the right target audience, on the right platform, and with the right message. ZYGSOFT not only makes your brand visible but also develops social media strategies that generate engagement, conversions, and sustainable brand value. We adopt a data-driven and performance-based approach suited to the dynamics of each platform.

faq.q: Why is social media management necessary?
faq.a: It is vital for increasing brand awareness, building direct links with the target audience, and projecting a professional digital image.

faq.q: On which platforms should we be active?
faq.a: We determine a custom platform strategy for you (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.) based on your business type and where your target audience spends time.
We prepare a monthly content calendar and, following your approval, plan posts with designs tailored to your brand.

web-ve-uygulama-gelistirme.title: Web and Application Development
web-ve-uygulama-gelistirme.subtitle: Fast, Secure and Scalable Digital Solutions for Your Business
web-ve-uygulama-gelistirme.content: Your website or mobile application, which is the face of your company in the digital world, must provide excellent user experience in today's competitive conditions. At ZYGSOFT, we develop global-standard web and mobile applications tailored to your brand's needs with our Antalya-based team. We build high-performance, SEO-friendly, and scalable infrastructures using the latest technologies.
features: Custom Software Solutions and API Integrations
High Performance and Global SEO Optimization

faq.q: How long does the process take?
faq.a: Corporate sites are usually completed within 2-4 weeks, while comprehensive web applications take between 4-12 weeks.
Yes, all our web projects are developed with the 'Mobile-First' principle to work perfectly on all devices.

faq.q: Do you provide hosting and domain support?
faq.a: Yes, we provide the necessary server and domain infrastructure as a turnkey solution for your project to go live.

marka-kimligi-ve-grafik-tasarim.title: Brand Identity and Graphic Design
marka-kimligi-ve-grafik-tasarim.subtitle: An Unforgettable Brand Story and Visual Identity Design
marka-kimligi-ve-grafik-tasarim.content: A strong brand identity is the first step in leaving a lasting impression in the minds of your target audience. We carry out corporate identity and unique graphic design work that will distinguish you from your competitors and reflect the story of your brand. Every detail, from your logo to your color palette, is meticulously designed.
features: Original Logo and Corporate Identity Design
Digital Media and Print Material Designs

faq.q: How many revisions does the logo design include?
faq.a: For perfect results, we usually offer 3 different concepts and the right to unlimited minor corrections on the selected one.

faq.q: What files do you deliver for corporate identity?
faq.a: We deliver print-ready PDFs, vector (AI, EPS), and PNG/JPG formats for digital use.

faq.q: Do you only do logo design?
faq.a: Yes, but we recommend our full corporate identity package for a holistic brand perception.

dijital-strateji-ve-pazarlama.title: Digital Strategy and Marketing
dijital-strateji-ve-pazarlama.subtitle: Data-Driven Digital Growth and Performance Marketing
dijital-strateji-ve-pazarlama.content: Design or software alone is not enough; a proper strategy is essential for growth. As ZYGSOFT, we analyze where your brand should be in the digital world and how to reach the target audience at the lowest cost. We bring real conversions to your business with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and SEO (Search Engine Optimization).
features: Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), and TikTok Ads
Comprehensive Data Analysis and Regular Reporting

hedef-kitle-analizi.title: Target Audience Analysis
hedef-kitle-analizi.subtitle: Know Your Customers Closely and Increase Your Sales
hedef-kitle-analizi.content: You cannot deliver the right message without knowing who you are communicating with. We prevent your digital marketing budget from going to waste by conducting detailed target audience and persona analyses specific to your industry. Using data analysis, we uncover the strategies that will deliver your brand's message to the potential customers who need your products the most.

About.title: About Us
About.intro: At Zygsoft, we don't just build websites — we design powerful digital experiences that inspire, engage and convert brands in the digital world.
About.missionDesc: We work to ensure that brands make a difference in digital. We help them tell their stories effectively, increase their online visibility and achieve measurable results. We achieve this with creative digital strategies, smart design and innovative software solutions.
About.visionDesc: As Zygsoft, our vision is to make every digital interaction meaningful by combining design, technology and storytelling. Our aim is not only to make brands visible, but to transform them into brands that make a difference in the digital world.
About.teamSubtitle: We design impressive digital experiences for your brand with creative minds.
About.bioP1: I'm Gürkan Yavuz. I love thinking with code and transforming ideas into digital solutions. I am a graduate of Akdeniz University Computer Programming; Combining my technical infrastructure with creativity, I design powerful, modern and user-oriented digital experiences for brands.
About.bioP2: Developing systems working with React, Next.js, Laravel and modern web technologies; In every project, I focus on establishing a perfect balance between design, performance and user experience. For me, every line of code is a detail that further clarifies the brand's story in the digital world.
About.bioP3: Beyond software, I also believe in the impact of design on the brand. I aim for every project to be not only functional but also visually consistent and inspiring. By integrating elements such as color, typography and composition that shape the user experience into software processes, I make design a natural extension of functionality.
About.quote: I see technology not just as a tool, but as a language that shapes the future of brands.

Contact.faqDesc: Details you might be wondering about our services and processes.
Contact.faqQ1: How long does it take to complete a web project?
Contact.faqA1: Depending on the scope and your needs, a standard corporate website takes 2-4 weeks, while custom software solutions take 4-12 weeks to complete.
Contact.faqQ2: What does the Zygsoft Comprehensive Legal Package include?
Contact.faqA2: This package includes instant text extraction (OCR) from scanned case files, automatic KVKK-compliant redaction of personal data (ID, name), AI-powered case summarization, and browser-based E-Signature capabilities.
Contact.faqQ3: How does the billing process work for Applications (SaaS)?
Contact.faqA3: After creating your free account, you send the amount of your selected package via wire transfer/EFT and upload the receipt to the system. Our team approves it instantly, and your panel becomes active in seconds.

services.udfProductWho: For lawyers, law firms, court clerks, and all professionals preparing legal documents.
services.udfProductSecurity: Your documents are instantly deleted after processing. KVKK compliant, privacy-first infrastructure.
